notes: SHIP v1.14.229 — .228 device-verify follow-ups (two fixes, both redesign-only). (1) FLAT block appearance: the .228 ghost-fix OVER-corrected — racked slots rendered as solid opaque type-colour slabs that drowned the label text. Rebuilt as a DARK tray body + thin type-colour LEFT accent + readable white text: body.rd .rack-canvas-block gets a dark opaque background (rgba(9,13,20,0.90)) that overrides the legacy full-fill under body.rd, plus color:var(--white); each type — canonical gpu/switch/storage/server/network/cooling PLUS the compute/accelerator/leaf/spine/disk/nvme/host/node/router/firewall/nic/pdu/fan/crah/crac aliases the COMPONENTS strip normalises — now drives ONLY border-left-color (the 3px accent stripe), not a full fill. Legacy full-fill untouched (all rules body.rd-scoped). (2) Version badge (#ver-stamp): (a) fixed the doubled-v — the setter did 'v' + PHANTOM_APP_VERSION.replace('phantom-','') = 'vv1.14.xxx'; dropped the redundant 'v' (the stripped string already starts with v), now reads 'v1.14.229'. (b) RELOCATED from a floating fixed overlay (position:fixed; top:safe-top+3rem; right:8px — which overlapped the newly-fitted FLAT elevation at U48) INTO the header as an inline pill next to the SYS status pill (#net-pill): the div moved into the header pill row, and body.rd #ver-stamp restyled from position:fixed to display:inline-flex. Legacy still hides it entirely (#ver-stamp{display:none}) so the shared header stays byte-identical under ?legacy=1. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks, CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved, three-stamp lockstep .228->.229, single #ver-stamp node (no dup id), ?legacy=1 byte-identical. NOTE: no ecc adversarial pass this ship (session cost) — the CSS reuses the exact specificity/legacy patterns ecc:code-reviewer validated on .228. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) FLAT racked slots = dark tray body + thin colour accent stripe + READABLE text (not solid slabs); (2) version pill sits in the HEADER next to SYS, reads 'v1.14.229' (single v), no overlap with the elevation; (3) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Batch now 8 owed (.220/.221/.224/.225/.226/.227/.228/.229). Stage A stays GATED until this verifies clean.
